notes: Light dogfood of the Set 068 contract-test floor on Set 069's own S1/S5 probes. The S5 ratchet/replacement-gate safety + integrity properties are deterministic and probeable; the meta-oracle residual (an authored probe could mint a false REPRODUCED, or a replay could validate the wrong entrypoint) is the non-probeable share reserved for the path-aware critique + the human-as-defense.

defectClasses.description: The ratchet auto-merges a candidate falsifier into the floor without all mechanical gates passing AND explicit human approval (the never-auto-merge / rubber-stamp safety property).
Mandatory floor-ratchet coverage is under-enforced -- a reproduced probeable defect is marked covered without its own stable-ref candidate (the S6 dogfood Major: a free-text description match).
The replacement gate reports meets_thresholds=True on an underpowered benchmark (manual run wrongly relaxed on too few real cases).
The scoreboard schema/validator accepts a smuggled verdict/meets/cadence field, letting a hand-asserted verdict bypass the derived score.

The meta-oracle residual: a model-authored probe mints a false REPRODUCED, or a replay runs yet validates the wrong public entrypoint. No single deterministic assertion expresses this -- it is reserved for the path-aware critique + the human as the meta-oracle defense.
